response.original_title: Hollywood Rip Ride Rockit | Official Ride POV | Universal Studios Florida
response.overview: Adrenaline-pumping and music-thumping, the coaster gets you climbing straight toward the sky at a 90-degree angle. As soon as you buckle up, choose the music you want to enjoy throughout the ride. There are even cameras along the way to capture your every twist and turn. After the first ferocious drop, you'll tear through the track, reaching a blistering 65 mph. You'll want to relive this adventure again and again.
response.title: Hollywood Rip Ride Rockit | Official Ride POV | Universal Studios Florida
